form.formComment: Last start was well back in the run when 6th (Fr5) over 2138m at this track, beaten 35 m by Matteo (2:34.70) in Up to 3 LTW on March 27 at $61. Before that, was driven from back in the field when 6th (Fr5) over 1660m at this track beaten 22 m by Oakley Shard (1:55.50) in Up to 3 LTW on March 20 at $19. Has a low draw and should go well.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Restrained at the start to a rearward trailing position.

form.formComment: Didn't do much last start, 5th (Fr3) over 1850m after showing early pace at Marburg beaten 19 m by Rosies Boy (2:16.80) in 3yo+ No NR on April 5 at $21. Before that 7th (Sr3) over 1780m at Redcliffe, beaten 50 m by Two Ticks (2:09.00) in 2-3yo+ wins on March 26 at $61. Not keen.

form.formComment: Two back was sixth behind Rosies Boy at this track over 1660m in a Up to 3 LTW on March 30 at $9.50. Then a handy effort when third behind Laneys Last at Marburg over 1850m in a 3yo+ No NR on April 5 at $6. Go well again.

form.formComment: Didn't do much at the last run, 10th (Fr2) over 2040m after showing early speed at Redcliffe, well beaten by Dual Cam (2:28.90) in 2-3yo+ wins on March 19 at $6.50. form.formComment: Beaten favourite last start when second at Redcliffe on April 2. Scored the start prior at Redcliffe on March 25. Leading contender.

form.formComment: Two back was third after being driven well back, behind Alwaysbjoy at this track over 1660m in a 2-3yo+ wins on March 24 at $8. Then a handy effort when beaten by 1.1 m finishing second after a quick start, behind Moops at this track over 2138m in a 3yo+ NR up to 70 on March 31 at $1.65. Great chance to break through.

form.formComment: Two-year-old filly is racing in fine form. Won her last two outings at Redcliffe and this track. Last start won by 1.5 m as favourite when quickly away, (Fr1) at Redcliffe (2:09.90) beating Blue Dragon in Up to 3 LTW on April 1 at $1.70. Expected to go right on with it.
